query: SELECT ri.id, ri.ratingId, ri.itemName, ri.score FROM rating_items ri WHERE ri.score > 10 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT ri.id, ri.ratingId, ri.itemName, ri.score FROM rating_items ri WHERE ri.score > 10 LIMIT 5;
